name: codex-wakectl
description: Codex skill for scheduling wakes with codex-wakectl.

interface.shortDescription: Schedule wakes for app-server-backed Codex threads.
interface.longDescription: Codex Wakectl provides workflow guidance for Codex sessions that use codex-wakectl to send immediate wakes, schedule time, goal, or command-based wakes, and install a user systemd timer to process wake jobs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-wakectl to schedule a wake for an app-server-backed Codex thread.
